title: Cursor vs Claude Code for Frontend Teams: How to Choose
abstract: A practical comparison of Cursor vs Claude Code for frontend developers. Learn which workflow works best for rapid UI iteration, refactors, and team delivery.
meta-title: Cursor vs Claude Code for Frontend Teams: How to Choose
meta-description: Comparing Cursor and Claude Code for frontend work. See strengths, trade-offs, and a decision framework for choosing the right workflow per task.
